title: ハラハラなサバイバル

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We go to Director Akikawa's private beach for
some extracurricular activities one day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But while we're in the middle of a long-distance
swim, we suddenly get caught in a huge storm.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, is this for real?! Did we seriously get swept
onto a deserted island?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, sure... I guess. But we're literally in the
worst possible situation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin seems shaken up by the
unexpected turn of events.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thankfully, our phones still have a signal, and
we're able to contact Director Akikawa, who
organizes a rescue squad to come get us soon.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... If I'd known this would happen, it would've just stayed home and trained at the academy.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
At the very least, we wouldn't have gotten swept
out to the middle nowhere...
choice_data_list:
Extracurricular activities come with a lot of
benefits, though.

Extracurricular activities come with a lot of
benefits, though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to her how training in conditions
different from what she's used to can help her
adapt and run in all sorts of situations.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Then that means I'm getting left further and
further behind the others...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Argh! Just thinking about that makes me so mad!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's practically gnashing her teeth in frustration.
I try to think of what I can do to make her feel
better.
choice_data_list: Let's do what we can to be found sooner!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Narita Taishin that if we train while we're
waiting to be rescued, then we can minimize lost
time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Fine. I'll do whatever exercises you can think up,
so let me at 'em.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps feeling the pressure, Narita Taishin shows
a surprisingly willingness and quickly agrees to my
proposal. I put together a training list for her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hup... Hup!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Ugh! There are so many branches and rocks in
the sand! I can't run properly with them in my
way!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(What kind of race would be on such a beaten-up
track?!)
choice_data_list: Look ahead and find the best route!
Look ahead and find the best route!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Do you seriously think I don't know what to do?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Running on the obstacle-filled beach appears to
improve her leg strength and decision-making
skills better than regular beach running.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! You want me to catch fish with my bare
hands? Is this seriously training?!
choice_data_list:
It'll help improve your motion-based vision and
reflexes!

It'll help improve your motion-based vision and
reflexes!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Really? If it turns out you're lying just to get some
food, I'm gonna wring your neck!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Argh, damn it! They keep darting around!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You wanna mess with me? Then I'll catch all of you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! I-I got one?! Trainer, what do I do with
this?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's all slimy and freaking out... Hurry up and do
something!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
All right! That's one fish down! I'm gonna catch a
huge one next.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...What are you smiling about?
choice_data_list: I'm just glad you're having fun.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! What are you talking about, bonehead?
You think I'm playing here?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Why am I doing all the work anyway? Don't just
stand there. Pull some weight, slacker.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Go look for shellfish in the sand or dive for sea
urchins or something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We spend our time completely absorbed in
training with the natural equipment around us
until we're rescued.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The training appears to pay off as Narita Taishin
improves substantially after we get home.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest that we write "SOS" in the sand to make
it easier for the rescue squad to find us.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, okay. I'll get all restless if I don't do
something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We search the area and find a large branch we
can use to write the rescue message.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes over writing the message, and I direct
her from far away to make sure the letters are
large enough to spot easily.
choice_data_list:
The next letter should be three steps to the
right!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Roger! ...Oof!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Damn... It's actually pretty tough writing these
letters. I guess this counts as training too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm done! The SOS message is good to go!
choice_data_list: Great job. Have some coconut juice.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: How'd you find coconut juice on a deserted... Wait, is that an actual coconut?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! I've only seen people drink straight out of a
coconut in video games.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (This actually tastes pretty good...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Phew. I'm pooped.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sure.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey, um...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The letters in the sand are great and all, but what
do we do if no one ever finds us?
choice_data_list:
We put our heart and soul into writing it, so it'll
be fine!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmph. You would say something like that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Did I seriously ask a question I knew the answer to and still feel better after getting a response? Ugh, I'm such a doofus.)
Hey... HEEEY!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is that... the rescue squad?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey! Wake up, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, how can you even sleep at a time like
this?! Get your act together!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
A member of the rescue squad. He's here because
he saw our SOS message.

text_block_list.name: Rescue Squad Member
text_block_list.text:
We were able to locate you two sooner than
expected thanks to that!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While the unexpected incident was a huge ordeal,
I feel as though I've gotten a little closer to
Narita Taishin as a result of today.
